race.comment: YUUKI (5) was heavily supported and got the job done last start at Swan Hill to break the maiden at $1.30, showing a neat little turn of foot late. She'd been knocking on the door for a while and can go on with it now in another suitable affair. GUNZ (1) also won his maiden at Swan Hill as favourite but did it two back, good in a much stronger race at Bendigo last time with 52kg. He's a speedy type who will roll forward and take plenty of catching. CAVERN (3) ran a solid race first up despite being beaten, sticking on for a narrow third. Expect improvement now, he'll be hard to hold out. JUMPIN' JEWELLETTE (6) won her maiden narrowly here before a let-up and could be one to go on with it while HARFORD (2) just lasted fresh and will be fitter.
